summary: Very good front‑of‑house audience recording of a top‑half‑dozen show on the tour.
review: Reviewers rate this concert as one of the better performances of the tour, placing it in the top half dozen. The front‑of‑house (FOB) audience tape sounds notably clear for an arena setting, with decent acoustics at Capital Center. While no specific song highlights are mentioned, the overall impression is strongly positive.

ai_rating.rationale: Single detailed 4‑star review praises both the musical performance and the surprisingly clear FOB recording; limited data leads to low confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: FOB audience source noted as very good sounding with decent arena acoustics; no major flaws reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Described as a strong performance, ranking among the top shows of the tour.
